notes: Five steps: welcome / passphrase / broker / pairs / confirm. Broker step opens F007 wizard in a new tab. Passphrase step adapts to keychain availability. Reset-install page is separate at /settings/reset-install.
review_criteria: Design each of the five steps + the reset-install page on desktop and 375 px mobile
Progress stepper should read at a glance which step is current / done / upcoming
Legal agreement on step 1 must be visible without scrolling past the fold
